Premium marble, granite, and natural stone installation for high-end residences and showrooms across Menlo Park, Cupertino, and the greater Bay Area. 为湾区各地的高端住宅与展厅，提供顶级大理石、花岗岩及天然石材的定制加工与安装服务，服务范围覆盖门洛帕克、库比蒂诺及大湾区。

Client Satisfaction客户满意度

Established in 1999, B&B Marble is one of the best known stone fabricators in the San Francisco Bay Area. We are dedicated to providing our customers with high-quality stone fabrication and installation services. B&B Marble 成立于1999年，是旧金山湾区最知名的石材加工商之一。我们致力于为客户提供高品质的石材定制加工与安装服务。

We specialize in luxury residences, showrooms, and large-scale apartments — serving clients across Menlo Park, Cupertino, Palo Alto, Danville, Saratoga, Los Altos, Fremont, and beyond. 我们专注于豪华住宅、展厅及大型公寓项目，服务范围覆盖门洛帕克、库比蒂诺、帕洛阿尔托、丹维尔、萨拉托加、洛斯阿尔托斯、弗里蒙特等地区。

Since inception, we have completed more than 2,000 projects and participated in over 1,200 commercial and residential remodeling projects. We carry a wide variety of stone including Cambria, MSI, Silestone, Dekton, Caesarstone, Vadara, and IRG. 自成立以来，我们已完成逾2,000个项目，参与了1,200余项商业及住宅翻新工程。我们提供多种品牌石材，包括Cambria、MSI、Silestone、Dekton、Caesarstone、Vadara及IRG等。

We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We carry both the B and C-54 license. Lic #1147938. Jary LLC dba B&B Marble. 我们持有完整的营业执照、保证金及保险，持有B类和C-54类执照。执照编号：#1147938。Jary LLC，经营名称为B&B Marble。

Portfolio项目案例

Our Work我们的作品

Discuss Your Project咨询您的项目

From sweeping kitchen islands to spa-inspired bathrooms, every B&B Marble project is a testament to the beauty of natural stone and the craftsmanship behind it. For over a decade, we have partnered with homeowners across the San Francisco Bay Area — from Palo Alto to Menlo Park, Santa Clara to San Jose — to bring their vision to life through precision fabrication and installation of the world's finest marble and stone. 从宏大的厨房岛台到媲美水疗的浴室，每一个B&B Marble项目都是天然石材之美与精湛工艺的见证。十余年来，我们与旧金山湾区各地的业主携手合作——从帕洛阿尔托到门洛帕克，从圣克拉拉到圣何塞——通过精密加工与安装世界顶级大理石与石材，将他们的愿景化为现实。

Calacatta marble island with walnut cabinetry卡拉卡塔大理石岛台配胡桃木橱柜 Menlo Park
Statuario marble island in open-plan kitchen开放式厨房大理石岛台 Santa Clara
White marble island with built-in wine fridge白色大理石岛台，内嵌酒柜 Palo Alto
Marble island countertop with wave pendant light大理石岛台配波浪形吊灯 Millbrae
Nero Marquina marble countertop and full-slab backsplash黑金花大理石台面与整板背景墙 San Jose
Calacatta quartz island, walnut cabinetry, skylight开放式厨房天窗下的大理石岛台 Cupertino
Calacatta marble, oak vanity, brushed gold fixtures全大理石浴室配独立式浸泡浴缸 Saratoga
What We Offer我们的服务

Full-service
stone solutions 全方位
石材解决方案

From initial material consultation to final installation, B&B Marble delivers an end-to-end experience designed for discerning clients who expect nothing less than perfection. 从最初的材料咨询到最终安装，B&B Marble为追求卓越品质的客户提供一站式服务体验。

01

Material Consultation材料咨询

Expert guidance through our curated selection of marble, granite, quartzite, travertine, onyx, and porcelain.专业指导您从精选的大理石、花岗岩、石英岩、洞石、玛瑙及瓷砖中做出最佳选择。

02

Custom Fabrication定制加工

Precision templating and cutting using the latest CNC technology and time-honored hand-finishing techniques.采用最新CNC技术与传统手工精修工艺，进行精密放样与切割，确保每条边缘、每个开孔都臻于完美。

03

Professional Installation专业安装

Seamless installation by our skilled craftsmen, who treat every project with the same care regardless of scale.由经验丰富的工匠进行无缝安装，无论项目规模大小，均以同等细心对待每一个项目。

04

Kitchen Countertops厨房台面

Elevate the heart of your home with stone countertops tailored to your cooking habits, aesthetics, and architectural details.以定制石材台面提升您家的核心空间，完美契合您的烹饪习惯、美学风格与建筑细节。

05

Bathroom & Shower浴室与淋浴间

Transform bathrooms into private sanctuaries with book-matched marble walls, sculptural vanity tops, and hand-laid mosaic shower floors.以对称拼花大理石墙面、雕塑感梳妆台面与手工铺贴马赛克地面，将浴室打造成私人圣地。

06

Showroom & Commercial展厅与商业空间

We partner with interior designers and brands to deliver premium stone environments — floors, feature walls, reception desks, and beyond.与室内设计师及品牌合作，打造引人注目的高端石材空间——地面、特色墙面、前台及更多。
